title: Pots are OP
description: transforms ordinary pots into the ultimate treasure chests! Why mine for hours when you can simply smash pots to receive overpowered gear, rare resources, and god-tier
body:
## 🏺 Pots are OP 🏺
### ✨ What to Expect
Forget the grind. This datapack is designed for players who want to jump straight into the action, build massive empires, or just experience the thrill of becoming overpowered in record time.
Whether you're doing a chaotic multiplayer challenge with friends or a hilariously fast-paced single-player run, every pot you find is a lottery ticket—and you are guaranteed to win.

![Jx](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4386b75a96373c255aeede3c92c117076f9aaa0d.png)

### 🔥 Key Features
 * **⚔️ God-Tier Gear Instantly:** Smash a pot and watch the magic happen. Drops can include max-enchanted armor, legendary weapons, and unbreakable tools.
 * **💎 Endless Riches:** Running low on resources? Pots now rain down diamonds, netherite ingots, enchanted golden apples, and rare materials you normally have to grind hours for.
 * **🏃 Speedrunner's Dream:** Perfect for custom challenges, UHCs, or modified speedruns. Get fully geared up in the first five minutes of your world!
 * **🎮 Multiplayer Chaos:** Spice up your server! Watch your friends fight over who gets to break the next pot they find in a trial chamber or desert temple.
 * **⚙️ Plug & Play:** No complicated setup required. Just drop it into your datapacks folder and start swinging your pickaxe.
### 🛠️ Compatibility & Installation
We know how annoying it is when your favorite datapacks break after an update. That’s why **Pots Drop OP Loots** is fully optimized and tested for the latest versions of Minecraft!
 * **Supported Versions:** 1.21, 1.21.1, 1.21.2, all the way through 1.21.11.
 * **Installation:** Simply download the .zip file, drag it into your world's datapacks folder, and type /reload in-game (or restart your world).
### Ready to break the game (and some pots)?
Stop digging and start smashing. **Download Pots Drop OP Loots today and claim your god-tier rewards!**
